hero.associationName: Association Initiative Al Amal Pour l'Intégration Sociale
hero.title: WHO WE ARE
hero.description1: Founded in 2018, the Al Amal Initiative Association helps young people in precarious situations, particularly former residents of social protection establishments, to integrate socio-economically.
hero.description2: It offers professional training, personal development, and academic support, all while working with partners to provide a solid support network.

fullDescription.title: Association Initiative Al Amal Pour l'Intégration Sociale
fullDescription.description: Founded in 2018, the Al Amal Initiative Association helps young people in precarious situations, particularly former residents of social protection establishments, to integrate socio-economically. It offers professional training, personal development, and academic support, all while working with partners to provide a solid support network. The association also advocates for inclusive policies in favor of these young people, in order to build a more equitable society.

presidentMessage.title: President's Message
presidentMessage.portrait: Portrait of Hani El Harraq, President of the Association
presidentMessage.greeting: Dear members and partners of the Association Initiative Al Amal for Social Integration,
presidentMessage.paragraph1: In this new year, I would like to express my deep gratitude to each of you who, since the creation of our association in 2018, has contributed to making Initiative Al Amal a major player in the field of social protection and professional integration of young people from social protection establishments throughout the kingdom. Our commitment to dignity, the right to a second chance, and social protection remains at the heart of our action.
presidentMessage.paragraph2: As a nationally recognized association, we have consolidated our impact through fruitful partnerships and conventions with the public and private sectors. The coming year offers new opportunities to strengthen our mission and extend our positive influence.
presidentMessage.paragraph3: Together, let us continue to work to offer a promising future to young orphans, focusing on social and professional integration. I count on your continued commitment and unwavering support to make every initiative a source of positive transformation in the lives of those we serve.

cta.title: Join us in our mission
cta.description: Together, we can make a difference in the lives of young people in precarious situations.

2018.title: Year of creation and structuring
2018.description: The year 2018 marks the official creation of the Association Initiative Al Amal for Social Integration. This first year was dedicated to establishing the legal, administrative, and organizational framework of the association, as well as identifying the priority needs of young people in vulnerable situations. The first social and educational actions laid the foundations for the association's project.

2019.title: Deployment of first actions
2019.description: In 2019, the association expanded its interventions through social and educational support actions for young beneficiaries. Support, guidance, and awareness-raising activities were implemented, alongside strengthening the network of local partners, thus consolidating the association's presence on the ground.

2020.title: Continuity and proximity support
2020.description: Despite a challenging social context, the year 2020 was marked by the continuity of the association's essential actions. The focus was on social, moral, and educational support for young people, with a proximity approach aimed at maintaining connections, preventing dropout, and responding to urgent situations.

2021.title: Launch of the structuring Forsa w Taahil program
2021.description: The year 2021 represents a strategic turning point with the launch of the Forsa w Taahil program, dedicated to training, qualification, and socio-professional integration of young people. This program enabled the structuring of personalized support pathways and strengthened the employability of beneficiaries, while opening the way to lasting educational partnerships.

2022.title: Development of educational partnerships and scholarships
2022.description: In 2022, the association consolidated the Forsa w Taahil program through the development of partnerships with schools and higher education institutions. These collaborations enabled the granting of scholarships to young beneficiaries, facilitating their access to qualifying training and higher education.

2023.title: Academic monitoring and pathway valorization
2023.description: The year 2023 was dedicated to academic, social, and personal monitoring of young beneficiaries of scholarships and training. The association also highlighted success stories, strengthening the motivation of young people and the credibility of its programs with institutional and educational partners.

2024.title: Strengthening impact and institutional outreach
2024.description: In 2024, the association continued to strengthen its social integration actions through the expansion of its programs and the consolidation of its partnerships. Participation in institutional and social events contributed to increasing the visibility and outreach of the association at the local and national levels.

2025.title: Maturity, evaluation, and perspectives
2025.description: The year 2025 marks a phase of maturity for the association. Efforts were directed towards evaluating the overall impact of actions taken since 2018, particularly the Forsa w Taahil program and scholarship schemes. This year also made it possible to define new strategic orientations to ensure the sustainability and extension of projects.
